purpose: Add genuinely new player-level rotation and role-state information using only completed prior games. This design does not train, refit, recalibrate or score a candidate model.

primary_scope.source_games_allowed: completed games strictly before target analysis cutoff

point_in_time_policy.same_day_date_only_fallback: source Eastern game date must be strictly earlier than target Eastern game date
point_in_time_policy.postponed_or_rescheduled_game: use governed actual tipoff and source end timestamps; do not infer from schedule date alone

source_qualification.authoritative_game_identity: governed Silver game_id, game date, home and away teams
source_qualification.preferred_player_minutes_source: NBA official completed-game boxscore or already-qualified equivalent archive
source_qualification.preferred_starter_source: official completed-game starter flag when available; otherwise starter inference is a separate explicitly flagged research proxy
source_requirements: source game start and end timestamps
team ID or governed team mapping
source_qualification.http_403_or_access_control: record blocked source; do not bypass

season_boundary_policy.optional_carryover_diagnostic: same-team official player IDs from prior season, separately namespaced and never silently merged into primary features

player_state_features.name: minutes_avg_prior_3
player_state_features.definition: mean official minutes in player's prior three completed team games

player_state_features.name: minutes_avg_prior_5
player_state_features.definition: mean official minutes in player's prior five completed team games

player_state_features.name: minutes_avg_prior_10
player_state_features.definition: mean official minutes in player's prior ten completed team games

player_state_features.name: start_rate_prior_5
player_state_features.definition: official starts divided by eligible prior five games

player_state_features.name: start_rate_prior_10
player_state_features.definition: official starts divided by eligible prior ten games

player_state_features.name: appearance_rate_prior_10
player_state_features.definition: games with positive official minutes divided by eligible prior ten team games

player_state_features.name: days_since_last_appearance
player_state_features.definition: target cutoff minus most recent completed positive-minute appearance

player_state_features.name: recent_return_state
player_state_features.definition: player appeared in the most recent prior game after missing at least three immediately preceding team games; uses prior games only

player_state_features.name: role_rank_prior_5
player_state_features.definition: descending rank of minutes_avg_prior_5 within team at target cutoff

team_state_features.name: rotation_players_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: count of distinct players with positive minutes across prior five completed games

team_state_features.name: top5_minutes_share_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: share of team player-minutes allocated to five highest minute-average players

team_state_features.name: top8_minutes_share_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: share of team player-minutes allocated to eight highest minute-average players

team_state_features.name: top8_minutes_share_prior_10
team_state_features.definition: same concentration over prior ten games

team_state_features.name: rotation_entropy_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: normalized entropy of player minute shares over prior five games

team_state_features.name: rotation_entropy_prior_10
team_state_features.definition: normalized entropy of player minute shares over prior ten games

team_state_features.name: top8_set_continuity_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: mean Jaccard similarity of consecutive top-eight minute sets over prior five games

team_state_features.name: starter_set_continuity_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: mean Jaccard similarity of official starter sets over prior five games; null when official starter flags are not qualified

team_state_features.name: minutes_allocation_volatility_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: mean player-level standard deviation of minute share across prior five games

team_state_features.name: role_change_magnitude_prior_3_vs_10
team_state_features.definition: sum of absolute player minute-share changes between prior-three and prior-ten windows

team_state_features.name: new_team_rotation_players_prior_5
team_state_features.definition: players with team-specific history shorter than five games who rank in current top eight by prior minutes

matchup_features.missing_side: difference remains null; do not impute missing side to zero

trade_and_roster_policy.roster_absence_without_source_row: unknown; not inactive, traded or zero minutes
trade_and_roster_policy.player_removed_from_rotation: derived only from prior appearances and minutes, never target-game nonappearance

missingness.zero_is_valid_only_when: explicit completed-game source reports zero minutes or an explicitly defined count is zero
missingness.not_yet_observed: never converted to healthy, inactive or DNP

qa_gates.source_minutes_team_total_check: validate against official game duration including overtime

diagnostic_plan.phase_1: coverage, source-time and distribution QA only
diagnostic_plan.phase_2: training-free residual audit against frozen model error and market residual on predeclared populations
diagnostic_plan.phase_3: separately predeclared walk-forward candidate only after source and residual gates pass
diagnostic_plan.primary_residual_population: same-game private market joins with T-60 batch absolute error <=5 minutes

explicit_non_goals: reuse market prices as model features
calculate EV, ROI, CLV or Drawdown
